turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 我们今天来设计这个Reconciliation工作流的状态机。首先，我需要确定有哪些触发条件可以启动协调流程。

state_before.rendered_mermaid: graph TD

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 好的，首先得有协调请求入口。然后呢？

state_before.rendered_mermaid: graph TD

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 还有Generation比较逻辑，这是判断资源是否需要更新的核心。另外，当新的Kode被创建时也需要触发协调。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]

planner.notes: Added states for ReconciliationRequest, Generation, and Kode as triggers.

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 明白，那规格变更和资源状态变化也应该触发协调流程吧？

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]

planner.notes: No new nodes required; existing nodes cover ReconciliationRequest, Generation, and Kode triggers mentioned in stage 3.

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 没错，还有定时协调和手动操作触发，以及删除时间戳被设置的情况。这样我们就有了8个初始触发状态。

gate.reason: turn 5 reached end boundary for stage 4

    Kode["Kode"]

planner.notes: Added SpecChange and ResourceStateChange states as triggers for stage 4.

turn.content: 现在我们有了这些触发点。接下来需要建立主流程，从触发点到处理逻辑的连接。

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 当ReconciliationRequest触发后，首先需要拉取最新的Kode。然后检查删除时间戳。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 这样就建立了从ReconciliationRequest到FetchLatestKode，再到CheckDeletionTimestamp的路径。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 对于Generation比较，我们添加两条分支：如果Generation改变了就进入MismatchDetected状态，否则进入NoMismatch状态。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 还需要评估当前阶段、更新观察到的Generation，以及增加重试计数和验证Kode的处理逻辑。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 接下来我们补充删除处理的基础设施。当DeletionTimestamp被设置时，需要进入HandleDeletingState状态。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 同时我们需要CheckGenerationMismatch来统一处理各种触发源进来的情况。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 资源的生命周期状态也很重要，需要有Inactive和Resuming来处理暂停和恢复的场景。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]

    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 还需要FetchTemplate来获取模板，以及CleanupResources来清理资源。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:

    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]

    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 现在把这些连接起来：CheckDeletionTimestamp根据是否有DeletionTimestamp分别走向HandleDeletingState或CheckGenerationMismatch。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 各种外部触发源（SpecChanged、ResourceStatusChanged、PeriodicReconciliation）都指向CheckGenerationMismatch。而DeletionTimestampSet直接到HandleDeletingState。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]

    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 现在我们添加重试机制。当处理失败时，需要进入Pending状态，然后增加重试计数并检查是否超过最大重试次数。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]

    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]

    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 对于暂停流程，当Inactive状态检测到暂停信号时，需要进入Suspending状态。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 资源管理方面，我们需要EnsureResources、CheckResourceReadiness和CheckResourceHealth来确保资源的就绪和健康状态。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:

    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 清理完成后需要RemoveFinalizer来移除终结器。

    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]

    Kode["Kode"]

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 连接这些逻辑：CheckMaxRetries后如果还能重试就返回Pending，如果超过限制就进入Failed。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]

    SpecChange["SpecChange"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 还有AssessCurrentPhase根据当前阶段不同，可能进入Pending、Suspending或其他状态。

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 现在进入最后阶段，添加终端状态。我们需要两个终端：END_TRUE表示成功完成，END_REQUEUE表示需要重新排队处理。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 还需要Configuring、Provisioning、Active、Failed和Suspended这些运行时状态。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: 当CheckGenerationMismatch检测到不匹配时，进入Configuring状态开始配置流程。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 从Configuring到EnsureResources创建资源，然后进入Provisioning状态。之后检查资源就绪状态。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: Active状态会定期CheckResourceHealth来保持健康检查。如果资源不健康就回到Configuring进行修复。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 对于失败状态，Failed会触发IncrementRetryCount并检查是否超过最大重试次数。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师A
turn.content: Suspended状态在收到恢复信号后通过Resuming回到Configuring进行重新配置。

state_before.rendered_mermaid:
graph TD
    Reconciliation["Reconciliation"]
    ReconciliationRequest["ReconciliationRequest"]
    Generation["Generation"]
    Kode["Kode"]
    SpecChange["SpecChange"]
    ResourceStateChange["ResourceStateChange"]
    ScheduledReconciliation["ScheduledReconciliation"]
    ManualOperation["ManualOperation"]
    DeletionTimestampSet["DeletionTimestampSet"]

turn.speaker: 工程师B
turn.content: 最后补充各个状态到终端的连接：RemoveFinalizer成功移除后到END_TRUE，各中间处理状态如果需要继续处理则到END_REQUEUE。这样完整的状态机就建立起来了。
